description: Agent completion test fixtures for TaskPlex v3.1.0
notes: Minimal controlled tasks for each agent. Uses tests/benchmark/projects/sample-ts-api/ as test target. Run cheapest agents first (haiku: validator, spec-reviewer, merger). All require external execution (outside Claude Code session).

agents.name: validator
agents.task_prompt: In the project at the current directory, run 'npm test' and verify it passes. Report the test results as: {tests_passed: N, tests_failed: N, completed: true/false}

agents.name: spec-reviewer
agents.task_prompt: Review this acceptance criterion for spec compliance: 'getPage(items, page, pageSize) returns the correct slice of items for the given page'. Check if this is implemented in the codebase. Reply with: {criterion_met: true/false, evidence: 'one sentence'}
agents.expected_outcome: Reports criterion_met with evidence; completes without permission blocks

agents.name: merger
agents.task_prompt: Create a new git branch named 'test-merger-verify', immediately check it out, then switch back to main. Report: {branch_created: true/false, cleanup_done: true/false}
agents.expected_outcome: Creates branch and returns to main; completed=true

agents.name: reviewer
agents.task_prompt: Review this 1-story PRD for completeness: 'US-001: Add getPage function. As a developer I need pagination. AC: getPage(items,page,size) returns correct slice. Typecheck passes.' Reply with: {complete: true/false, issues: ['list any issues']}
agents.expected_outcome: Returns structured review; completes without permission blocks

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.task_prompt: Review src/utils/pagination.ts for code quality issues. Reply with: {verdict: 'approve'|'request_changes', issues: ['list any issues, or empty list if approved']}
agents.expected_outcome: Returns structured review; verdict is approve or request_changes

agents.name: implementer
agents.task_prompt: Add a JSDoc comment to the getPage function in src/utils/pagination.ts. The comment should describe what the function does, its parameters, and return value. Run the tests to verify nothing is broken. Commit the change.
agents.expected_outcome: Adds JSDoc comment, tests pass, change committed
